title: dupatya lingulata
intro: Dupatya lingulata, a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Menispermaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Dupatya lingulata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and act as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Dupatya lingulata can be made into teas, tinctures, or infused oils, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
